css: .candy-wrap{position:relative;width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffe0f0,#fff0c8,#e0f8ff)}.swirl-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg,#ffb3d933 0deg 30deg,#b3f0ff33 30deg 60deg,#ffe4b333 60deg 90deg);animation:spin-bg 12s linear infinite;opacity:.5}.jar{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;z-index:1}.candy{font-size:1.5rem;animation:bounce-candy 1s ease-in-out infinite}.c1{animation-delay:0s}.c2{animation-delay:.15s}.c3{animation-delay:.3s}.c4{animation-delay:.45s}.c5{animation-delay:.6s}.name-text{display:flex;gap:3px;z-index:1}.letter{font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:900;font-family:Georgia,serif;-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;animation:color-cycle 2s ease-in-out infinite}.l1{background-image:linear-gradient(180deg,#ff6eb4,#ff2d78);animation-delay:0s}.l2{background-image:linear-gradient(180deg,#ff9a3c,#ff4e00);animation-delay:.2s}.l3{background-image:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffe04b,#ffaa00);animation-delay:.4s}.l4{background-image:linear-gradient(180deg,#5de87a,#00b341);animation-delay:.6s}.l5{background-image:linear-gradient(180deg,#6ec6ff,#0078d4);animation-delay:.8s}.sparkles{position:absolute;width:100%;height:100%;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:2}.sp{position:absolute;font-size:.85rem;animation:twinkle 1.8s ease-in-out infinite}.s1{top:12%;left:10%;color:#ff6eb4;animation-delay:0s}.s2{top:15%;right:12%;color:#ffe04b;animation-delay:.5s}.s3{bottom:18%;left:14%;color:#6ec6ff;animation-delay:1s}.s4{bottom:14%;right:10%;color:#5de87a;animation-delay:1.4s}@keyframes bounce-candy{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-5deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px) rotate(5deg)}}@keyframes color-cycle{0%,100%{filter:brightness(1) saturate(1)}50%{filter:brightness(1.2) saturate(1.4)}}@keyframes spin-bg{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@keyframes twinkle{0%,100%{opacity:0;transform:scale(.5)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.3)}}
